(A) 72
(B) 60
(C) 90

A: (1 - 10/100)(1 - 10/100) = 9/10 * 9/10 = 81/100 = 81% of original price. The answer is (D).

Q: A 380 m long train running at the speed of 120 kmph crosses another train running in opposite direction at the speed of 80 kmph in 9 seconds. What is the length of the other train?

Speed of the first train in m/s = 120 * (5/18) = 33.33 m/s
